parsed_output.justification: Justin claims to be the Seer and says he saw two Villagers in the center. However, Caitlynn explicitly claims she looked at Justin and found him to be the Werewolf, and Mike (claiming to be the Troublemaker) also identifies Justin as the Werewolf. Since only one player can be the Seer, and Justin's defense is inconsistent (later suggesting he might be the Robber or that Mitchell stole from him), it is highly probable that Justin is bluffing and is the Werewolf.

validation.justification: Justin claims to be the Seer and says he saw two Villagers in the center. However, Caitlynn explicitly claims she looked at Justin and found him to be the Werewolf, and Mike (claiming to be the Troublemaker) also identifies Justin as the Werewolf. Since only one player can be the Seer, and Justin's defense is inconsistent (later suggesting he might be the Robber or that Mitchell stole from him), it is highly probable that Justin is bluffing and is the Werewolf.
